state.description: Current board configuration and player to move

fields.board: list of 8 rows, each a list of 8 atoms, each empty | light_man | dark_man | light_king | dark_king. Row 1=top, Col 1=left

move.description: A player moves one piece either by a simple diagonal step or by jumping an opponent piece

parameters.from_row: integer 1-8, row index of the piece to move
parameters.from_col: integer 1-8, column index of the piece to move

legal_move_conditions: For a man simple move: abs(ToRow-FromRow)=1 and moving forward (dark man ToRow=FromRow+1, light man ToRow=FromRow-1)
For a king simple move: abs(ToRow-FromRow)=1
Jump move allowed if abs(ToRow-FromRow)=2 and the intermediate square contains opponent piece
If any capture move exists for CurrentPlayer, the move must be a jump
apply_move_effects: If jump: remove opponent piece at intermediate square
If a man reaches promotion row (row 8 for dark, row 1 for light): replace it with king version
If a jump was made and further jumps are possible for the moved piece, CurrentPlayer remains the same, otherwise switch CurrentPlayer
turn_order: Players alternate turns; dark begins; multiple jumps by the same piece in one turn are resolved before switching
draw_conditions: Neither player has any jump (capture) moves available
